title: Fresh wave of selling hits metals
section_path: Fresh wave of selling hits metals
section_path_text: Fresh wave of selling hits metals
summary:
Main
Precious metals were hit with a fresh wave of selling, which weighed on sentiment across the metals complex. Oil fell amid easing geopolitical tensions. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-02-06 125457.png | assets/2026-02-06_fresh-wave-of-selling-hits-metals_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_21ee614e264c.png

Market Commentary
Copper struggled to hold gains from earlier in the week as signs of weaker demand in China weighed on sentiment.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Precious metals were hit with a fresh wave of selling, which weighed on sentiment across the metals complex. Oil fell amid easing geopolitical tensions.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper struggled to hold gains from earlier in the week as signs of weaker demand in China weighed on sentiment. Inventories of copper rose in London Metal Exchange warehouses in Asia.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Outflows from silver-backed exchange trade funds have increased significantly in recent days. However, there could be further to come.
